title: alectorolophus parviflorus proles fallax
intro:
Alectorolophus parviflorus proles fallax, also known as Alectryon ramiflorus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. This plant is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Alectryon ramiflorus include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat a range of health issues including wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Alectryon ramiflorus include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically or taken internally to promote healing and overall well-being.

Note: Alectryon ramiflorus is the correct name of the species.
